title: AI Consolidation, Biotech Opportunities, and World Models with Sarah and Elad
title_zh: Sarah和Elad的人工智能整合、生物技术机会和世界模式
full_text: In this episode of No Priors, Sarah and Elad unpack the current state of the AI market - whether it’s consolidating, what’s enabling or blocking key mergers, and where the most promising untapped opportunities lie, particularly in biotech. They also explore the rise of world models and how AI’s novel methods for understanding complex systems may ultimately reshape how humans approach discovery and problem-solving. Show Notes: 0:00 Is the AI market consolidating into clear winners? + the physi

They also explore the rise of world models and how AI’s novel methods for understanding complex systems may ultimately reshape how humans approach discovery and problem-solving.
